sources.title: Centessa Announces IND Clearance for ORX142

asset.name: ORX142
asset.one_liner: Next-generation OX2R agonist with differentiated profile for neurological and neurodegenerative disorders

biology.simple_explanation: Same OX2R target as ORX750, but ORX142 is designed with a differentiated pharmacological profile optimized for neurological and neurodegenerative conditions where cognitive function, neuroprotection, and sustained wakefulness may be key therapeutic goals.
biology.neuro_rationale: Beyond sleep-wake regulation, orexin signaling is implicated in cognitive function, neuronal survival, and metabolic support. Restoring orexin tone may have benefits in conditions like Alzheimer's disease, Parkinson's disease-related sleepiness, and other neurodegenerative disorders.

mechanism.how_it_works: Highly potent and selective OX2R agonist with a pharmacological profile differentiated from ORX750, optimized for neurological indications
mechanism.differentiation_from_orx750: Different PK/PD profile designed for sustained CNS exposure relevant to neurodegenerative conditions

lead.name: Neurological and neurodegenerative disorders
lead.rationale: Orexin deficiency or dysfunction is observed in multiple neurodegenerative conditions including Alzheimer's and Parkinson's disease

phase1.key_finding: Phase 1 data showed a highly differentiated profile from ORX750

catalysts.what_to_watch: Which neurological indication is selected for patient studies
